news.t: Dana Investment Advisors Launches Two New ETFs: Dana Unconstrained Equity ETF (DUNK) and Dana Concentrated Dividend ETF (DIVE)

holdings.infoBox: DIVE is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Philip Morris International stock at 8.75%, Restaurant Brands International at 4.81%, IQVIA Holdings at 4.49%, Elevance Health at 4.13%, and Keurig Dr Pepper at 4.07%.

overview.description: The Dana Concentrated Dividend ETF (DIVE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation and income by actively managing a narrow portfolio of dividend-paying equities, primarily large-cap US companies. The fund uses a behavioral finance-driven approach that combines qualitative analysis with sector-relative quantitative scoring. DIVE was launched on Sep 16, 2025 and is issued by Dana.

data.title: Dana Investment Advisors Launches Two New ETFs: Dana Unconstrained Equity ETF (DUNK) and Dana Concentrated Dividend ETF (DIVE)
